title: coreopsis occidentalis
intro: Coreopsis occidentalis, also known as the western coreopsis or golden tickseed, is a flowering plant native to the western United States. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Coreopsis occidentalis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
